golf_course

Feathers & Fairways

Welcome to Feathers & Fairways

Build your dream team and compete for glory

sports_golf How to Join a Tournament

1
Get your access key

Your commissioner will give you a unique access key for the tournament. Keys look like XXXX-XXXX-XXXX and can only be used once.

2
Go to Join League

Click Join League in the navigation bar, then enter your access key and click Validate Key.

3
Enter your name & pick your team

You'll be shown the golfer field split into 9 groups. Pick exactly one golfer from each group for a 9-player team.

4
Submit before the tournament starts

Teams lock when the tournament begins. Once submitted, check the Leaderboard tab to follow your team's fantasy points in real time.

groups How Golfer Groups Work

Every golfer in the tournament field is assigned to one of 9 groups based on their world ranking and win probability for that event.

1
Group 1 — Elite

Top-ranked favourites. Highest ceiling, most likely to contend.

2 – 5
Groups 2–5 — Contenders

Strong players with a realistic shot at a top finish.

6 – 9
Groups 6–9 — Long Shots

Lower-ranked players. Higher risk, but a hot week can make your team.

Because you must pick one golfer per group, every team has the same structural balance — your edge comes from picking the right players within each tier.

calculate Fantasy Point Scoring

Fantasy points are awarded per hole for each golfer on your team, then summed across all four rounds.

Eagle or better +2 pts 2 or more under par on a hole
Birdie +1 pt 1 under par on a hole
Par 0 pts Even on a hole
Bogey or worse −1 pt 1 or more over par on a hole
info Amateur rule: Amateur golfers cannot receive negative fantasy points. Bogeys and worse score 0 instead of −1.

analytics Database Statistics

vpn_key Generate Access Keys

sports_golf Add Golfer

content_paste Paste Golfer Names

emoji_events Create Tournament

download Fetch ESPN Field & Set Groups

Pull the tournament field from ESPN, auto-assign golfers to 9 groups by world ranking, then adjust before saving.

Group Assignments — drag rows or change dropdowns to adjust, then save.

edit_note Score Editor

group Team Editor

file_upload Import Tournament Scores

Import scores from an ESPN tournament ID or upload a tournament.json file from get-golf-scores.

OR

preview Import Preview:

check_circle Matched Golfers (0)

warning Unmatched Golfers (0)

refresh Refresh ESPN Scores

Refresh scores for a tournament that was previously imported via ESPN.
